name: Savory Meat Filled Manicotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
2. Cool in a single layer on foil.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. In a skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
5. Add chicken, 1 cup mozzarella cheese, eggs, bread crumbs, parmesan cheese, onions, oregano, salt, and black pepper.
6. Fill each cooled pasta tube with about 1/4 cup meat filling.
7. Spread a thin layer of spaghetti sauce on the bottom of a 13 x 9-inch (33 x 23 cm) pan.
8. Place filled pasta in the prepared pan; cover with remaining sauce.
9. Sprinkle with remaining 1 cup grated mozzarella cheese.
10. Bake, covered, for 45 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
